About Me

I am a DevOps Engineer passionate about Cloud, CI/CD, Automation and Infrastructure-as-Code. I have hands-on experience with Linux, Azure, Terraform, GitHub Actions, Docker and Kubernetes. I love building fast, modern and automated cloud deployments.

Projects

▪ CI/CD Pipeline using GitHub Actions

Fully automated deployment pipeline with testing, build & deploy stages.

▪ Terraform Infra Setup on Azure

Created storage accounts, VMs, VNets using Terraform IaC.

View Project

▪ Dockerized NGINX Web App

Containerized and deployed NGINX static app on cloud VM.
